sg_weights._note: Colonial CC: Par-70 shotmaker's course. Tight tree-lined fairways, small bermuda greens. APP elevated (accuracy/approach premium). OTT reduced (distance penalty for offline shots). PUTT/ARG moderate. Derived from course profile — no sg_weights in COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY entry.

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights. Colonial has rich modern course history (annual event since 1946). Course fit layer has HIGH confidence — increase to 0.24/0.19 if Phase 1 coverage > 50%.

course_history_note: Charles Schwab Challenge is an annual event at Colonial CC. No fallback remapping needed — all historical rounds indexed under event_id=21. Rich course history expected (high field coverage).
winner_archetype: Precision iron player. Tight fairways reward accuracy off the tee, small bermuda greens reward sharp approach play and short game. Historical winners include Spieth (3×), Fowler (2×), Fleetwood — all elite approach players. Form matters: in-form ball-strikers excel at Colonial.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Standard individual BBI v8.5 rankings. Colonial has rich course history. Phase 1 should return high field coverage (50%+). If coverage < 30%, investigate fallbacks.
course_notes: Colonial Country Club, Fort Worth TX. Par-70, 7209y. Annual event since 1946 (oldest non-major on PGA Tour). Tree-lined fairways, small bermuda greens, creek in play on several holes. Ben Hogan's home course. Bermuda rough demands creativity. Notably: distance is not the primary differentiator here — Spieth has 3 wins, Fleetwood 2 recent wins.
_week_correction_note: week_num corrected 16→17 by Mnemosyne on 2026-05-25. CJ Cup Byron Nelson (event_id=19, May 21-24) was week 16 but pipeline missed it. Charles Schwab Challenge is week 17.
